title: Recollections of Richard Huemer oral history transcript
creator: Huemer, Richard Martin, 1898-1979, interviewee
Adamson, Joe, 1945- , interviewer
University of California, Los Angeles. Dept. of Theater Arts
University of California, Los Angeles. Oral History Program
description: Transcript of a ten-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Dept. of Theater Arts; the UCLA Oral History Program provided technical advice
Huemer recalls his early years, his career as animator and story director, and his collaboration with Joe Grant on Fantasia, the Reluctant dragon, and other Disney productions

The UCLA Oral History Program : catalog of the collection / compiled by Constance S. Bullock (Los Angeles : Oral History Program, University of California, Los Angeles, 1982) is available in the UCLA Dept. of Special Collections
Forms part of: Oral history of the motion picture in America
Also forms part of: Oral History collection, Dept. of Special Collections, University Library, University of California, Los Angeles
